title: Implement SQLite claim module
description: Implement MAP_System/db/claims.py providing claim_task(), heartbeat(), release_task(), expire_leases(), and submit_task() using the atomic UPDATE pattern from artifacts/planning/sqlite-task-board.md §3. All operations work against MAP_System/map.db.
acceptance_criteria: claim_task() returns True only when rowcount==1 (atomic claim); returns False if already claimed or max_attempts exceeded
heartbeat() extends lease_expires_at and updates heartbeat_at
release_task() sets status to SUBMITTED and clears claimed_by and lease
expire_leases() returns tasks back to READY when lease_expires_at has passed
All functions accept a db_path argument and use MAP_System/map.db as default
